behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names FetchTasklet.zig, onProgressUpdate, onBodyReceived, has_more, is_waiting_body - all symbols the tests check for.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the race and desired behavior but doesn't give the exact code or line numbers for the guard.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_empty_chunk_guard_present requires exact pattern `.list.items.len == 0` and test_terminal_zero_length_chunk_not_affected requires literal 'and'/'&&' in guard - an alternative fix using e.g. `scheduled_response_buffer.list.items.len < 1` or nested ifs instead of a single combined condition would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The f2p tests (test_empty_chunk_guard_present, test_guard_placement_correct, test_terminal_zero_length_chunk_not_affected) are all regex text-matching on source; only test_stream_api_not_broken executes code and it's a p2p sanity check not a behavioral race test.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub couldn't pass the regex-based guard requirements; the tests check for specific semantic conditions (buffer empty + has_more + success + return).

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction's required behaviors (guard with has_more, terminal chunk unaffected, comment about race) are all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and named descriptively.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers are consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The instruction points to FetchTasklet.zig which is the domain file; doesn't give exact line numbers.
